meta_title: For Students: debugging with AI to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Master Your First App Development
content.seo_description: Break through coding plateaus. Learn how to debug with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code to build professional-grade software for your portfolio.
content.answer_block: Stop spinning your wheels on syntax errors. By integrating AI agents like Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform debugging from a guessing game into a surgical operation. Use AI to analyze stack traces, identify architectural bottlenecks, and provide context-aware refactoring, allowing you to ship your first production-ready application faster.
content.intro:
The screen is glowing, the cursor is blinking, and your code is a labyrinth of red squiggly lines. You have been stuck for hours, staring at a cryptic error message that feels like a wall between you and the developer you want to become. This isn't a failure; it is the exact moment where true engineers are forged.

You are about to learn the secret of the modern software architect: you don't need to know every answer, you just need to know how to query the right intelligence. By leveraging AI-driven debugging, you turn these roadblocks into learning milestones, reclaiming your time and accelerating your transition from student to professional builder.

steps.title: Isolate the Error State
steps.description: Before throwing code at an AI, you must define the failure. Create a 'repro.md' file that explicitly states what you expected versus what happened.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current codebase. I am encountering a silent failure in the authentication middleware. Based on the provided logs, identify the specific line causing the state mismatch.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --file repro.md --task 'Analyze the authentication middleware for state mismatch'

steps.title: Contextualize via Claude Code
steps.description: Claude Code needs context. Use the CLI to index your project structure so the AI understands your file dependencies.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a summary of the current project architecture to feed into Claude Code for deeper debugging context.

steps.title: Automated Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Ask the AI to trace the execution flow. This prevents 'band-aid' fixes and forces you to understand the underlying logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a root cause analysis on the provided stack trace. Explain the logic error without giving me the code fix immediately.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Trace execution flow for the auth error and explain the logic gap'

steps.title: Refactor with Intent
steps.description: Once the error is understood, guide the AI to write a refactor that follows clean code principles.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the identified function for better error handling. Ensure the code follows SOLID principles and includes unit test stubs.

steps.title: Validation and Regression Testing
steps.description: Never trust a fix until it survives a regression test. Use the AI to generate test cases that prove the bug is squashed.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of integration tests that verify this specific bug cannot reappear in future builds.

pro_tips: Always ask the AI to explain the 'Why' behind a fix; if you can't explain the solution to a peer, you haven't actually learned the fix.
Use 'Rubber Ducking' with Claude Code—explain your thought process in the CLI, and let the AI challenge your assumptions.
Keep your context window clean by deleting temporary test files after each successful debug session.
Prioritize 'Test-First' debugging; write the test that fails before asking the AI to fix the implementation.
Use Antigravity to generate documentation for your fixes; this builds your portfolio and makes your code readable for future employers.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully debugged your app, deploy it to a platform like Vercel or Railway and document the process in a README.md file to showcase your problem-solving skills to recruiters.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer a student struggling with errors; you are a builder who knows how to weaponize AI to overcome any technical hurdle. The path to your first SaaS launch starts with one successful debug. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
